title: Federal Highway congestion due to installation of LRT3 bridge
snippet: Commuters in Shah Alam faced severe congestion on the Federal Highway due to the installation of the LRT3 bridge. This highlight's a key pain point: while the LRT3 is a long-term solution, its construction is currently a major source of traffic frustration in the city.

title: No plan to upgrade Federal Highway, too costly, says Nanta
snippet: The government confirmed there are no plans to physically upgrade the Federal Highway despite it operating at the most congested service level. This means the city must focus on public transport and demand management rather than expecting more road lanes.

title: MBSA plans to boost shuttle bus frequency
snippet: Shah Alam City Council (MBSA) reported that they are working to increase the frequency of free shuttle buses (Bas Smart Selangor) to address high demand and complaints about long waiting times.
